title.en: Ye Tian couldn't wait to snatch this fog mother...

content.en:
The core of the Mist Mother is the best thing Ye Tian has ever seen to assist in comprehending the rules of the extradimensional dimension.

"If this core of the Mist Mother belongs to the human race, then how many second-realm super-dimensional realm powerhouses will have to be cultivated!"

Ye Tian couldn't wait to snatch this fog mother's core away.

But he knew that he couldn't do it, not to mention that he was only in the first realm, even if it was a cultivation in the second realm or even the third realm, he didn't want to snatch the core of the fog mother.

Maybe when his strength completely crushes the entire extradimensional elf clan in the future, he will have the hope of snatching the core of the fog mother.

But at that time, his strength was already so strong that it was unimaginable today, and he couldn't look down on the core of the fog mother.

Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend the core of the Fog Mother, and only wanted to comprehend the superdimensional rules to an extremely high level within ten extradimensional epochs.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's super-dimensional bloodline of the replicating body was about to dry up, and the physical injury was very serious, if he didn't leave, he would definitely be exposed, and he would no longer be able to hide it.

So, he immediately left.

His departure is very normal, no extradimensional elf has used up the ten extradimensional epochs at one time, naturally he has been enlightened for a while, and then he goes back to silently comprehend, and after digesting, he will come to comprehend the core of the fog mother.

Anyway, his total enlightenment time is ten extradimensional eras, which is calculated according to the enlightenment time.

After going back.

Ye Tian immediately changed to a replica body, allowing his physical body to return to its peak, and then waited for a few more days before entering the No. 10 Fog Mother Fruit again and comprehending the core of the Fog Mother.

In this way, Ye Tian returned to the Mist Mother Fruit where the Mouton Realm Lord was located from time to time, and it was very low-key, but it did not cause any waves.

Gradually, the long years passed.

At this moment, Ye Tian had already comprehended five extradimensional epoch times, but the time he stayed had exceeded six extradimensional epochs.

"Six hundred extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was very excited, this was the result of his progress during this time.

According to the information he had, if the superdimensional realm at the peak of the first realm comprehended the superdimensional rules, it could prompt the superdimensional body to transform into the second realm, thus completing the breakthrough.

However, with only a trace of the realm of extradimensional rules, there was almost no way to make a breakthrough in cultivation.

If you comprehend a hundred threads of extradimensional rules, then you will break through one hundred percent, and if you want to break through to the third realm, the most basic requirement is to comprehend ten thousand threads of extradimensional rules, that is, one point of transcendent rules realm.

But a point of the super-dimensional rule realm only makes the super-dimensional realm at the peak of the second realm have a negligible breakthrough success rate, and if you really comprehend a point of the super-dimensional rule realm, you don't dare to impact the third realm, otherwise once the impact fails, you will almost definitely die.

And if you want to perfectly break through to the third realm, you must comprehend the extradimensional rules to the seven-point realm.

Therefore, the dream goal of many second realm super-dimensional realms is to comprehend the super-dimensional rules to the seven-point realm, but this step is too difficult, and it is difficult for countless second-realm powerhouses to do it.

"I have comprehended the six hundred silk extra-dimensional rules, and I have far met the needs of breaking through the second realm, if I have comprehended the ten extra-dimensional eras, even if the follow-up progress is slower, there is a high probability that I will be able to raise the realm of the super-dimensional rules to one realm~!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, it will be difficult for him to get such an opportunity again in the future.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's super-dimensional rules stopped at the realm of six hundred and thirty-three super-dimensional rules, and it was difficult to go any further, even with the assistance of the core of the fog mother, it was difficult to break this bottleneck.

"I have comprehended the extradimensional rules, and with the assistance of the core of the fog mother and the soul pupil, I will still fall into a bottleneck?"

Ye Tian was very surprised, he had never expected this situation.

He carefully estimated it, guessing that it was because of his own talent.

His talent is indeed very high, he has a copy talent, and he has a lot of talents in copying, but that was in the past, and his current talent level is about the same as that of ordinary extradimensional creatures.

Moreover, the level of copying talent is a little low, and he can't copy the superdimensional talent of those extradimensional creatures at all.

That is, his understanding is insufficient.

The reason why he was able to comprehend the extradimensional rules so quickly was completely because he used the strange blood pupil to analyze the extradimensional rules in the past, sacrificing a large number of duplicate bodies, so that he could comprehend the extradimensional rules.

If other extradimensional realms can also sacrifice one doppelganger after another like him, they will definitely be able to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Therefore, in terms of talent, he does not have an advantage over many extradimensional creatures.

Other extradimensional realms will fall into a bottleneck, and he will naturally fall into a bottleneck as well.

Stuck in a bottleneck, if you want to break through, it's not impossible.

The second method is to use some kind of precious treasure to forcibly break the bottleneck, so as to break through the extradimensional rules.

There is a third way, that is, to improve the talent, the talent to improve, the understanding to improve, and it is easier to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

However, if you want to improve your talent, you must transform your copy talent again to be able to copy your extradimensional talent.

How difficult it is to let the copying talent transform again, I have been searching for a long time, and I still haven't found a treasure that can make the copying talent attractive!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

But. []

This trip to the extra-dimensional elves may be an opportunity, maybe there are treasures here that can transform the replication talent!

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian walked through the Fruit of the Mother of Mist and other areas in the Extradimensional Rule Territory, but he did not encounter any treasures that could transform the Replication Talent.

Then, he looked for an opportunity to enter the non-open Mist Mother Fruit to see if he could find such a treasure. (Money money good) this day.

Ye Tian heard a rumor, that is, the wood of the mother of fog gave birth to the flowers of the mother of fog, these flowers of the mother of fog can make the superdimensional bloodline transform, and can also improve the understanding.

But such a flower of the Mother of Mist is very rare, and it will not be given unless it is a peerless genius.

"Will this Mist Mother Flower help to replicate the transformation and improvement of the talent?"

Ye Tian guessed so much in his heart, and he was ready to seize the Flower of the Mist Mother.

After his secret investigation, he finally knew that the flower of the Mother of Mist was in the fruit of the No. 6 Mother of Mist, and with Ye Tian's current realm, he was undoubtedly not qualified to enter the fruit of the No. 6 Mother of Mist.

Thinking about it, it seems that there is only one way, that is, to kill a superdimensional elf from the No. 6 Fog Mother Fruit, ban the identity of the other party, enter the No. 6 Fog Mother Fruit, and then take the opportunity to seize the Flower Uncle of the Fog Mother.

Once the Flower of the Mist Mother is really useful, that's his real chance!
